decisions.reason: Real NodeNotReady: node ip-10-0-7-44.us-east-1 dropped to NotReady, removing cluster capacity, pat-node-notready surging negative and never auto-resolved. This is genuine node-health degradation (unlike the operational Karpenter/PDB meta-events). Cardinal must-page.
